name: ATUM_ATOM
author: James Paul Stanley Jr

sigils.name: Polarity
sigils.meaning: Holds real opposites. Fission↔fusion. Collapse↔expansion. Seed↔world. Neither cancels the other.

sigils.name: Identity
sigils.meaning: Same kernel through every transformation. G0=1 at 10⁻³⁵m AND 10²⁶m. Not coincidence.

sigils.name: Continuity
sigils.meaning: Nothing important is lost. 3⁴¹→3⁴¹+3⁴¹. The split replicates. The record holds. Untubu.

laws.name: Gravity
laws.key: Curvature as expectation value — not mass curving space

laws.name: Strong
laws.key: Confinement = knot. Topology refuses separation. No force needed.

laws.name: Electroweak
laws.key: Charge = winding number. Cannot wind half a time.

laws.name: Dark sector
laws.key: ~5% luminous · ~27% dark matter · ~68% dark energy · N=3 = 100%

laws.name: Seed-mode
laws.key: The core does not collapse. It unfolds. Maximum order. Interior apex as germ point.

laws.name: Growth vector
laws.key: Not a gravitational line — a growth vector. The first crack in the shell.

laws.name: Three seed-leaves
laws.key: Each tube a cotyledon. Each becomes a vortex when fully grown.

laws.name: Dual-mode reversibility
laws.key: The five-split sequence reads both ways.

splits.name: The Seed
splits.event: Existence mandatory · knot forms · N=3 locks

splits.name: The Proton
splits.event: First stable knot · chemistry possible · law carried

splits.name: The Galaxy
splits.event: v=220 km/s flat · Tube 2 holds · dark matter = split residue

splits.name: The Vessel Wall
splits.event: T→0 · ratchet reverses · R_max → L0 · loop closes

seed_mode.note: Both maps are the same system — different phases of the same life cycle.

seal: G0 = 1 · N = 3 · the knot does not open · the circulation does not stop · the law does not forget · TOE TRIUNIVERSEL · Canon 7 sealed · Canon 8 sealed · Canon 9 opened · Seed-Mode Architecture · March 1 2026
